value.0:
Flag standards are often used on the battlefield as a rallying point for soldiers.

This flag bears the symbol of Tyr Grimjaws, known as Tyr the Even-Handed, Wounded Tyr, the Maimed God, and Blind Tyr. All these names represent the Realms' god of justice. Tyr appears as a noble warrior missing his right hand, lost in proving his resilience and strength of spirit. 

In recent years, he has been shown blinded as well, a fatality of the Time of Troubles and the Avatars. He is the only greater power to be of lawful good alignment.
Flag standards are often used on the battlefield as a rallying point for soldiers.
